chapter_title: OF CONTRACTS, VOIDABLE CONTRACTS AND VOID AGREEMENTS
section_title: If any part of a single consideration for one or more objects, or any one
content:
24. If any part of a single consideration for one or more objects, or any one
void, if
or any part of any one of several considerations for a single object is
considerations
and objects unlawful, the agreement is void.
unlawful in
Illustration
part
A promises to superintend, on behalf of B, a legal manufacture of indigo, and
an illegal traffic in other articles. B promises to pay to A a salary of 10,000
Taka a year. The agreement is void, the object of A's promise and the
considerations B's promise being in part unlawful.
Agreement
